scripts.copy:assets: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'build' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'assets' -Destination 'build' -Recurse -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'build/docs' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'docs/tools' -Destination 'build/docs' -Recurse -Force"
scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target bun --outdir build && bun run copy:assets
